item.title: Version 1.6.0
item.description:
# Clippy v1.6.0 Release Notes
## New Features
### New App Icon - **Completely refreshed app icon** with improved high-resolution assets - **Consistent icon appearance** across all macOS contexts - **Enhanced asset management** throughout the application
### UI Improvements - **More compact selection toolbar** in clipboard view - **Improved alignment** of UI components - **Enhanced visual consistency** across the app
### Technical Improvements - **Optimized icon loading** in the About section - **Improved handling of macOS icon caches** - **Updated asset catalog** with consistent high-resolution assets - **Better resource management** for visual elements
## Bug Fixes - Fixed inconsistencies with app icon appearance in various contexts - Resolved issues with icon caching in macOS - Improved reliability of app icon updates - Enhanced user experience with consistent visuals
